name: textarea-with-button
visual_summary: A textarea component accompanied by a submit button, typically used in forms or data entry scenarios. It's a straightforward combination of a text input field and a call-to-action button, making it easy for users to input information and save it.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready form component with the following characteristics:

Name: textarea-with-button
Description: A textarea component accompanied by a submit button, typically used in forms or data entry scenarios. It's a straightforward combination of a text input field and a call-to-action button, making it easy for users to input information and save it.
Style: standard, clean, simple
Interactions: clickable, submit, interactive
Tags: form component, data entry, submit button

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
